workspaceNote: This workspace (LTS Stand Alone Software) is a full copy of Development/Business Website/Website Code/v23, including .git and origin remote. v23 itself was not modified. Standing instruction: everything stays local to this workspace for the entire build -- no push, no merge into a new vN folder or main -- until Dylan says otherwise. See DECISION_LOG.md.
auditBlockers: audit finding F006 (Critical, open): Privacy Policy under-discloses actual data collection -- blocks finalizing F007, F058
audit finding F007 (Critical, open): Resend not named as sub-processor in Privacy Policy -- blocks finalizing F007, F058
audit finding F011 (High, open, owner decision): Square terms-gate bypassable via direct link -- relevant to F028
audit finding F016 (High, open): zero automated tests anywhere in the repository -- Session 1 added the first 44, but this refers to the pre-Care-Hub site code, still true of everything outside src/

audit findings F030-F033 (owner decisions): Heroes Discount verification, full-payment vs deposit policy, plan scope, registration model -- block F026-F028, F049-F052, F002 respectively; see OWNER_DECISIONS.md

F056 (settings/feature-flag document logic + Blobs adapter -- src/settings/ -- document logic tested; Blobs adapter untested)

notStartedThisSessionByDesign: F003 (existing auth-login.js/session cookie mechanics already cover this per AUTHORIZATION_MODEL.md -- no gap identified, revisit only to add org context once F001 lands)
F004 (existing auth-password-reset.js already covers this -- no gap identified)
F059 (backup/recovery mechanics depend materially on the primary-data-store decision -- deferred to avoid designing around the wrong target)
ownerDecisionsRequired: Primary data store: Netlify Blobs vs managed PostgreSQL (new) -- highest priority, blocks F001/F002 persistence
Pricing, discounts, deposits, payment timing (audit F030, F031)
Website Care Plan / Small Business IT plan limits and included work (audit F032)
Customer account registration model: open vs invite-only (audit F033)
Data retention, deletion, backup-aging, legal-hold rules
Legal/privacy/consent wording, including open Critical audit findings F006 and F007
Remote support tooling / device agents / automated website changes scope boundary
filesRequiringReview: docs/development/ARCHITECTURE.md (target architecture proposal, frontend build-step recommendation)
knownRisks: No organization/tenant concept exists in the pre-Care-Hub codebase at all -- F001 is a from-scratch build, not an extension; src/domain/organization.js types exist but nothing persists them yet
Netlify Blobs has no secondary indexes; list()-scan pattern may not scale to Care Hub query needs regardless of which side of the data-store decision is taken
No payment webhook infrastructure exists at all -- F028 reconciliation starts from zero
Customer documents/images are stored as base64 data URIs in Blobs, not object storage with signed URLs -- does not meet target private-file requirements at scale
Two independent, near-duplicated single-file staff/customer console apps (admin.html, myaccount.html) with repeated auth/fetch boilerplate
F-numbering collision between audit findings (F001-F036) and Business Care Hub functions (F001-F060) -- mitigated via naming convention in DECISION_LOG.md

src/audit/blobsAuditSink.js and src/settings/blobsSettingsStore.js are written but not integration-tested against live Netlify Blobs (no credentials available in this environment) -- verify with a real smoke test once any endpoint calls them

src/policy/rbac.js's ROLE_CAPABILITIES map is a Session-1 transcription of the Roles & Permissions sheet's prose, not sourced from an individual F005 workbook (none exists yet, OWNER_DECISIONS.md #10) -- re-verify against the real workbook if/when provided
